【怪谈顺序：喜羊羊与灰太狼、熊和光头出没、海绵宝宝、哆啦A梦、花园宝宝、盗墓笔记….】
　　当规则怪谈降临蓝星，
　　九十九国天选者被迫参与这场生死游戏。
　　林牧作为龙国最后一位天选者，同时也是一名怪谈研究员。
　　当大部分天选者进入怪谈还保持人类样貌，胆惊受怕时。
　　他已经成功扮演怪谈角色，混的风生水起了。
　　沸羊羊:“懒羊羊我爱死你了，谢谢你帮我攻略了美羊羊。”
　　林牧:“都哥们儿，下次帮你攻略喜羊羊！”
　　灰太狼:“懒羊羊，我想买点羊肉。”
　　林牧：“小声点，别走漏了风声。”
　　熊和光头出没中的光头强:“李老板，有空常来狗熊岭玩哦！下次我还给你做猫头鹰肉和萝卜头肉吃。”
　　林牧:“得勒，回头就给你涨工资！”
　　哆啦a梦胖虎:“爸爸，您这么早就回来了？”
　　林牧:“对，我今天心情很不好，我要把你揍成猪头。”
　　海绵宝宝:“派大星，我们一起抓水母呀~”
　　林牧：“抓你·····”
　　许多年以后，林牧的生日宴上。
　　所有在怪谈副本中，认识的小伙伴都来了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bec27491f986be9dee8e1ee93028eb96","author":"词富","author_id":"","book_id":"7590782165311294488","book_name":"规则怪谈：从扮演团宠懒羊羊开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592006569919775256","read_count":"32687","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"339189"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"157","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,惊悚游戏,同人,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aee75c2cb3f59061bd720eac19586763~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450149&x-signature=kiLOERNgwcaj3iUVl%2FWU4M66ObE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1143914242784877","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"27"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194229CC6DCA5F298D29234218"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_co
